description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and release, using the docker:latest image and a docker:dind service for the build and release jobs, and the built image ($CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA) for the test jobs. In the build stage add a build-sha job that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with gitlab-ci-token and $CI_JOB_TOKEN, runs docker build --pull -t $IMAGE . and then docker push $IMAGE. In the release stage add a release-latest job that runs only on the master branch, logs in, pulls $IMAGE, tags it as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest, and pushes the release image, and a release-tag job that runs only on tags, logs in, pulls $IMAGE, tags it as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG, and pushes it. In the test stage add a test basic job that uses the $IMAGE container and executes a bitrise-trigger command with the $API_TOKEN, $BUILD_TOKEN, $REF, $WORKFLOW, $CI_COMMIT_SHA, and a message referencing $CI_JOB_NAME/$REF and $CI_JOB_URL; add a test detached job that runs bitrise-trigger in detached mode with similar parameters but workflow set to no-env; finally add a unit test job that runs pytest inside the $IMAGE container.
